creator: riggs@rrr.de
text:
On Fri, 10. Oct 2008, at 18:40 +0400, Dmitry Marakasov wrote
according to [Re: ports/127524: multimedia/mplayer lacks dependencies on Xv and dga]:
> This fails to build WITHOUT_X11:
> http://people.freebsd.org/~amdmi3/mplayer-nox11-0.99.11_8.log

True.
Should be fixed in the attached revision of the patch.

Riggs
